title: epidendrum scabrum
intro: Epidendrum scabrum, also known as the sandpaper orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
